data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for tracking bookings by source.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of tracking bookings by source (Instagram vs Facebook vs website). However, the evidence provided does not confirm whether bookings are being tracked by source, as it primarily discusses successful bookings through Instagram without any mention of Facebook or website bookings. This lack of comprehensive evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence confirming that bookings are tracked by source (Instagram vs Facebook vs website).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Check booking records for source tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Confirm that bookings are tagged with their respective sources.
